rules.title: Code simplification
rules.prompt: Check whether the changed code can be simplified without weakening behavior, validation, or diagnostics.

rules.title: Project style fit
rules.prompt: Check whether the change follows the local project style, naming, module boundaries, and existing helper patterns.

rules.title: Unnecessary abstraction
rules.prompt: Check whether the change introduced abstractions that do not remove real duplication, risk, or complexity.

rules.title: Class/function/file growth
rules.prompt: Check whether touched classes, functions, or files grew enough to need local extraction or clearer ownership.

rules.title: Hardcoded values and contracts
rules.prompt: Check whether new literals, paths, statuses, or messages should be named constants, schema fields, or shared contracts.

rules.title: Duplicated logic and contracts
rules.prompt: Check whether the change duplicates logic, validation, or contract strings that should stay defined in one place.

rules.title: Test and verification scope
rules.prompt: Check whether the focused tests and mandatory gates cover the behavioral risk without adding unrelated slow coverage.
